instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `74e4785` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master`.

- Merge commit: `837c974`
- Conflict resolved using the newer Stanford bio
- Working tree is clean
- `git diff --check` passed
- Site build unavailable because Bundler isn’t installed

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
--- branches ---
' && git branch -avv && printf '
--- recent reflog ---
' && git reflog --all --date=iso -n 40 && printf '
--- recent graph ---
' && git log --all --decorate

printf '%s
' '--- lost commit ---' && git show --stat --summary --decorate 74e4785 && printf '%s
' '--- commit changes ---' && git show --format=fuller --find-renames --find-copies 74e4785 && printf '%s
' '--- diverge

git show --format=fuller --stat d7d3e4b && git show --format= --find-renames d7d3e4b && git merge --no-edit 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39328be7 || { printf '
--- merge state ---
'; git status --short; printf '
--

git checkout --theirs _includes/about.md && git add _includes/about.md && git commit --no-edit && printf '
--- resulting graph ---
' && git log --graph --decorate --oneline -n 6 && printf '
--- merged content ---
' &
